definition: A strict definition of objective, constraints, and output schema that every prompt invocation must satisfy.
Representative input-output examples embedded in the prompt to teach pattern and style before live inference.
A deterministic checklist used to score output quality across correctness, completeness, and format consistency.
Untrusted input that attempts to override system instructions or exfiltrate protected context.
A stable batch of test cases rerun after prompt changes to detect quality drift.
An answer explicitly tied to supplied context or citations instead of model-only recall.
